SDK: close the pre-config identity race (render-phase init + no fallback prefix)

Found by the G1 live continuity probe: child effects run before the parent
provider's init effect, so experiment assignment on Property minted throwaway
ids under the 'sdk' fallback prefix - decoupling arms from real visitor
identity since F1's deploy. Fix: idempotent render-phase init (precedes ALL
descendant effects) + ids/consent refuse fallback keys pre-config. 4
regression tests pin the behaviour.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
